articles.headline: SK Hynix hits U.S. stock market as demand for memory chips soars amid AI frenzy
articles.summary: SK Hynix is launching its U.S. stock listing while demand for its memory chips far outpaces production capacity due to the AI boom, signaling critical supply constraints for businesses building AI infrastructure and projecting sustained price pressure on memory components.

articles.headline: Apple sued OpenAI alleging stolen trade secrets for AI gadgets
articles.summary: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI accusing it of stealing iPhone trade secrets to develop unrevealed AI hardware; the dispute introduces significant legal and operational risk for businesses planning AI gadget investments and could delay Apple's entry into the AI hardware market.

articles.headline: PayPal shares soar 17% after Stripe, Advent make $53B offer
articles.summary: Stripe and Advent International made a joint unsolicited offer to acquire PayPal for over $53 billion, causing PayPal shares to jump 16–17%; this deal could reshape payment infrastructure costs and compliance requirements for SMEs and large businesses using PayPal services.
